metadata.name: Spanish Sentences
metadata.description: Spanish learner sentences with English translations and chunk references into the Spanish words collection.

schema.label: Spanish
schema.description: Full Spanish sentence in natural surface form.

schema.label: English
schema.description: Natural English translation of the full sentence.

schema.label: Chunks
schema.description: Ordered learner-friendly chunks that reference terms from the Spanish words collection.

sentenceChunk.description: A learner-facing chunk inside the sentence.

fields.label: Chunk Spanish
fields.description: Chunk text exactly as it appears in the sentence.

fields.label: Gloss
fields.description: Short learner-friendly gloss for the chunk.

fields.label: References
fields.description: Referenced terms from the Spanish words collection.

entries.es: El gobierno anunció nuevas medidas económicas para reducir la inflación y apoyar a las pequeñas empresas.
entries.en: The government announced new economic measures to reduce inflation and support small businesses.
notes: This sentence is useful for government, business, and economy vocabulary.

chunks.es: y apoyar a las pequeñas empresas
